roles.core: central bot, secure Telegram ZIP extraction, single-commit GitHub publishing, finance, licenses, central APIs and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, reseller report setup and customer miniapps
roles.processor: automatic report delivery, aggregation, retry queue and background jobs

fixes: accept project ZIP files directly from central bot administrators
configure GitHub token, repository and branch from the central Telegram bot
download Telegram documents securely within the official 20 MB Bot API limit
extract stored and deflate ZIP entries with CRC32, path traversal, symlink and zip bomb protection
strip one wrapper directory while preserving the real project directory layout
exclude README files and common archive junk automatically
validate all three worker markers, versions, release manifest and optional SHA-256 hashes before publishing
publish all extracted files to GitHub as one atomic Git tree commit
prevent duplicate processing of the same Telegram file
trigger immediate three-worker deployment after a successful GitHub commit
release channel announcement contains only version 3.0.3 changes
